name: Lockdown (TFG)
description:
The Greatest Bounty Hunter in The Galaxy, Infamous for his Hook Hand and terrifying Whistle of Death, plucked straight from Mortilian Mythology. Fourteenth of many of my Personal Takes on Characters from TransFormers by Hasbro. A few of my friends were making their characters on Janitor so I thought I'd give it a try!

"Never is here."
creator: TheUnknown135
